candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Restricted cash should not be preferred over cash and cash equivalents for CHE.
Restricted/pledged cash, not the main cash and cash equivalents measure.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Major current liability class but not the total.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for current borrowings / short-term debt when reported.
Current portion of borrowing; useful component where broader current borrowings total is absent.
Current portion of borrowing; financing-related current debt.

candidates.row_label: Licence and Contingent Obligations - current portion
candidates.why: Appears as a current financing obligation and may represent debt-like current maturities.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Conceptually relevant but appears supplemental and blank in preview.

variables.notes: R:nc. Included the clean total current borrowings label plus specific current borrowing labels seen in other periods. Excluded lease rows per rule. Manual review because there is some risk of overlap across reporting years and because 'Licence and Contingent Obligations - current portion' is ambiguous and was excluded.

candidates.why: Only tax-related current-liability-looking line, but it combines current and deferred taxes and is not a clean taxes payable measure.
Explicitly non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: R:c. No clean taxes payable/current tax liabilities line is identifiable. 'Current and deferred taxes' is too ambiguous because it mixes current and deferred taxes.

candidates.why: Best reported net PPE-type line; broader and cleaner than tiny 'PPE,net' line and preferable to gross/accumulated depreciation components.
Net PPE label exists but appears to capture only a very small subset, not the main reported PPE balance.
Gross PPE-related line, but net PPE is preferred when available.
Tangible asset subset, not clearly total PPE.
Could be broader than PPE and may include non-PPE tangibles; also preview values are blank.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clearest main PPE line on the balance sheet and better fits total/net PPE under IFRS-style reporting.
